title: Verify existing implementation of session cleanup utility
description: The session cleanup utility `cleanExpiredSessions(store: SessionStore, maxAgeMs: number): number` already exists in `src/auth/session-cleanup.ts` with comprehensive tests in `src/auth/session-cleanup.test.ts`. All 5 tests pass. Implementation iterates over sessions, compares createdAt against cutoff timestamp, revokes expired sessions, and returns count removed.
existing_patterns: src/auth/session-store.ts: SessionStore class with private sessions Map, revoke() method, and Session interface with createdAt field
src/utils/*.ts: Single-function utility files with co-located .test.ts files
